message:
fix(capabilities): dynamic connector lists + diagnostics path coverage (udsdh)

Replace hardcoded connector vecs in capabilities and diagnostics with
dynamic functions that derive from the indexer registry:
- capabilities_connector_names() merges preferred ordering with registry
- diagnostics_connector_paths() covers all 14 connectors with env overrides
- Fix f64→i64 rounding in Track B breakdown sort (was truncating)
- Use CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION constant instead of raw literal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
